product.applications: Hydrocarbon separation, hydrogen purification, LPG drying
product.specs: Aperture 5Å; selective adsorption for n-paraffins; stable adsorption profile
product.overview: 5A molecular sieve is used where selective adsorption of linear hydrocarbons and moisture removal are required in one step.
product.technicalNotes: Use where product separation and purification performance must be matched to process gas composition and cycle design.
product.documentation: CoA, TDS, MSDS available on request
product.datasheet: Recommended for hydrocarbon drying and separation systems where 4A is too restrictive.
